events.title: Legacy batch 1: YOLO26l & YOLOv9m on stratifikasi + sawit-yolo
events.notes_md: Ran 4 experiments on old datasets (dataset-yolo-stratifikasi and sawit-yolo-dataset) using YOLO26l and YOLOv9m. These use old splits with potential image-level leakage.

runs.summary: YOLO26l on dataset-yolo-stratifikasi. Lowest tier — B4 very weak.
YOLO26l on sawit-yolo-dataset. Slightly better than stratifikasi on mAP50.
YOLOv9m on stratifikasi. Big jump over YOLO26l — recall much higher.
YOLOv9m on sawit-yolo. Best among batch 1 — strong B1 and B3.

events.title: Legacy batch 2: damimas-full + YOLOv9c on all old datasets
events.notes_md: Ran 5 more experiments: YOLO26l & YOLOv9m on damimas-full, plus YOLOv9c on all 3 old datasets. YOLOv9c on damimas-full achieved best overall mAP50.

runs.summary: YOLO26l on yolo-damimas-full. Clean DAMIMAS-only data helps — better B4 than old datasets.
YOLOv9m on damimas-full. Lower mAP50-95 than YOLO26l here surprisingly.
YOLOv9c on damimas-full — BEST legacy run. mAP50=65.0%, strong across all classes including B4.
YOLOv9c on stratifikasi. Decent but below damimas-full performance.
YOLOv9c on sawit-yolo. B4 better than stratifikasi but still weak.

events.title: Meeting: lock split strategy with lecturer
events.notes_md:
Lecturer wants comparison with SAME test set:
- Train all (damimas+lonsum) → test
- Train damimas only → test
- Train lonsum only → test

Composition: damimas split separately, lonsum split separately, combined = merge of both.
Use 2 seeds (42, 123) and 2 models (YOLO26 and YOLOv9).
Analyze per-class performance.
Tree-level split to prevent leakage.

events.title: Dataset preparation: tree-level split for v2 experiments
events.notes_md:
Created 3 datasets with tree-level split (no image leakage):
- DAMIMAS: 854 trees → 3596 images (train:2504, val:560, test:532)
- LONSUM: 99 trees → 396 images (train:276, val:60, test:60)
- COMBINED: merge of both → 3992 images (train:2780, val:620, test:592)

All verified: no tree appears in multiple splits.
